cases.title: Storage project path allowed a sibling-prefix escape
cases.lesson: Path containment must respect directory boundaries, not string prefixes.

cases.title: Outbox read allowed encoded backslash sibling escape
cases.lesson: Route-like path inputs must reject encoded traversal and sibling-prefix escapes.

cases.title: Line-ending representation locked a gate
cases.lesson: Gate verdicts should use normalized data and exit codes, not raw text formatting.

cases.title: Commit prefix was mistaken for actor identity
cases.lesson: Actor attribution needs direct data, not prefixes, timestamps, or naming conventions.

cases.title: Launch prompt was truncated before executor received it
cases.lesson: A spawned process is not proof that the intended instruction arrived.

cases.title: Harness measured the wrong thing
cases.lesson: A green harness is only useful when it directly observes the target behavior.

cases.title: PowerShell encoding corrupted reviewer input
cases.lesson: For Korean or structured text, verify bytes and round trips across PowerShell and cmd boundaries.

cases.title: Empty args launched a webserver and deadlocked a harness
cases.lesson: A harness command must fail closed when args are empty or accidentally start a long-running server.
